transcript.text:
I am here to see if they can really cook gyeranmari (Korean egg roll) in 30 sec!
[Notice her expertise from years of experience ]
[That was quick]
(Didn't I order like a min ago..?)
So it's 8 whole eggs per roll
and 6 times 8 is 48..
She's pretty much eating almost 50 eggs lol
(Is she for real?)
(What the...)
How can you eat 50 eggs?... There's no way
Bon Appetit!
Hello everyone~~
I was looking for a place to grab a quick bite for lunch
and I found this place known for cooking gyeranmari in 30 sec on an iron plate
[Janggobang Ripe Kimchi Stew]
I thought they specialize in gyeranmari, but it's actually a kimchi stew restaurant

Let's give it a try
Hello~
For how many?
I'm by myself. Remember I called earlier to film in here, sir?
Welcome~
Thank you
Would you like to order right away?
Yes please!
How many eggs do you put for 1 gyeranmari?
We normally put 7~8 eggs
7 to 8? That's quite a lot!
So what comes with the gyeranmari?
It comes with a bowl of rice and some side dishes
We also have sungnyung (scorched-rice water)
they're all self-service
Gotcha! Should I order kimchi stew as well?

So I'll just do 6 orders of gyeranmari, 1 kimchi stew, and 1 order of roast pork
6 orders of gyeranmari??
Do you have more people coming?
N..nope haha Are you for real eating all this by yourself?
Aight.. lol
[Pretty solid side dishes]
Here's the stew
Thank you!
Please be careful. It's very hot
Woww, it's humongous
Thank you! This is really big
I've never served this many egg rolls to a customer lol
Thanks, again!
[She didn't expect it to be this big]
Put it right here please!
Please enjoy

Wow... I was expecting half a portion of this
It's pretty much twice the size of what I was expecting
Bon Appetit!
Dip it in the sauce
Oh it's like....
[Like what..?]
It has a very thick and rich taste of eggs. It's amazing
Omg, take a look at the inside here
Seems like they rolled it when it was fully cooked
With soy sauce
Put the rice on top of the eggs(?)
Eggs(?)
LOL, I mean the gim (dried seaweed) not eggs
I should've ordered 5 plates instead of 6
It's really soft
With kimchi on top

Let me go get some more side dishes
[Side dishes are self-service and unlimited!]
Never seen a human being eating this much, seriously..
It's just shocking how a woman can manage to eat 6 orders
We can't even finish 1 plate haha
I totally forgot about the pork
so delicious
Wrap rice with gim (dried seaweek)
plus kimchi
The portions are huge. I think a lot of people will not be able to finish 1 plate
There's some meat in the stew!
lettuce!
ssamjang (Korean spicy dipping sauce)
Again, wrap it with gim
plus kimchi on top
The texture is very similar to jidan (egg garnish)

I think it's because they rolled it when the eggs were fully cooked
It's like a soft jidan roll
This is my first time eating my fill of gyeranmari
I'm sure you've never had this much of gyeranmari before as well.. haha
(Oops)
I love the fish cake here
They really do have nice fish cake here
So yummy
Their side dishes are amazing
Let's try with the pork
I read a lot of comments saying that I eat with my eyes closed
Do I really?
Probably I'm just looking at my food
and it makes my eyes look closed
Don't you think so? haha
(I didn't close my eyes)

See?!
(Blink)
(Blink x 2)
(Blink x 3)
(Blink x 4)
(Blink x 5)
5 bites and 5 blinks
(I still don't understand why)
[can't leave a single grain of rice!]
[Done with rice]
They also have unlimited sungnyung (scorched-rice water).
lemme go get it
Wow it's thick
lol I didn't even drink last night
I love this
Pork on top

This really goes well with sungnyung
It make the soup much more savory
(still eating?)
I'm a bit behind schedule to be honest
I definitely thought I had more than enough time to eat them all
In fact.. I was going to order more than 6 at first
but the portions are way bigger than what I expected, so I won't be able to finish them on time
So I will stop here today
But still! I finished 5 of them
That's 40 eggs
I thought it would take an hour at the most
It's no joke
I thought it'd be easy
(One last bite)
I'll take this to-go and eat in the morning with ramen
Thank you everyone~~~
